title: Feature Request: Add more types of files to an item card

posts.author: lioncladowls (Collin Oswald)
posts.cookedHtml:
Inside the item card/view, in the “Files” tab… we have the option to add “Files to Columns” and “Files to Gallery”.

This upload is limited to files on my desktop.
Our company uses Google Drive for almost all our file management.

FEATURE: Please add the ability to add Google Drive Files, Files via URL, and Monday.com docs to this Files Gallery and Files Column via this interface.
